en.extract:
The red-vented malimbe (Malimbus scutatus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Benin, Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, Sierra Leone, and Togo. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical swamps.

The '''red-vented malimbe''' ('''''Malimbus scutatus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Ploceidae]]. It is found in [[Benin]], [[Cameroon]], [[Ivory Coast]], [[Ghana]], [[Guinea]], [[Liberia]], [[Nigeria]], [[Sierra Leone]], and [[Togo]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical [[swamp]]s.
